title: Multiple Google Calendars
excerpt: I’d like to request the ability to sync multiple Google Calendars in one integration. Our Workspace has three staff calendars and 9 event category calendars. I have permission to edit all of them, but currently the Googl…

posts.author: SaraZ (Sara Zober)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to request the ability to sync multiple Google Calendars in one integration. Our Workspace has three staff calendars and 9 event category calendars. I have permission to edit all of them, but currently the Google Calendar sync on Monday only allows me to sync my personal calendar - none of the events which are the projects I’m actually planning!! Any idea when we can get this feature?

posts.author: ggrudo (Gideon Grudo)
posts.cookedHtml: Upvoted: I want to create condition-based calendars so that I can create and share multiple calendars specific to certain teams, and allow each team to view that calendar with only relevant items on it.

posts.author: KylenHunt (Kylen Hunt)
posts.cookedHtml: Upvoted: Has there been any progress on this? Our team also uses different calendars for different events and it would be highly useful to utilize each of them for clarity within the team.
